Game: Hit the Ice 1993-02-01T00:00:00-08:00 SKATE FOR VICTORY AND SURVIVAL! This radical hockey game pits you and your team against some of the toughest skaters ever to burn a hole in the ice! Victory goes to the team that kicks, punches, and high-sticks its opponent into slush. Standard hockey rules apply, plus a few surprises to stir things up. So lace on your skate and fasten your face mask - hockey is about to break loose! 2 <1>http://images.launchbox-app.com/85e0f089-8378-4f32-8595-fd678cd23b91.png</1> http://images.launchbox-app.com/6cb9170b-d13f-44ea-bb25-05c27df5dff5.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/69ca91fa-27ba-4b5e-9e11-abfdac41ddca.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/c4ecf28e-5347-46d9-83c8-e79262397d45.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/b3dea310-6640-4597-a6cd-097a380015c9.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/faeeb674-a8c7-4c59-bfd5-744c8b3d8d97.png 3.5 Not Rated Sports Taito Taito
